title: Christmas Atmosphere
description: 🎄 Christmas Atmosphere – snow, lights and holiday vibes ❄️
body:
# 🎄 Christmas / New Year Resource Pack ❄️

**Bring true holiday vibes into your Minecraft world!** ⛄✨  

This resource pack turns your game into a cozy winter fairy tale: more snow, more lights, and a lot more festive atmosphere. Perfect for survival, SMP servers with friends, and seasonal events. 🎅🎁  

## ✨ Features

- ❄️ Winter & holiday atmosphere all around the world  
- 🎄 More festive look for the environment and details  
- 🕯️ Cozy feeling for your Christmas / New Year playthroughs  
- 🎁 Works great with modpacks and shaders  


[![](https://imgur.com/71IXfzh.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2774)
